title: Anna University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Assistant Posts
description: Anna University has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Project Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Civil Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the Anna University Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
